untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit diamond pattern detection (geometric shape analysis), breakout direction classification, and pattern busting behavior — none of which are available in the allowed indicator set. The 'upward breakout climb at least 45%' and 'change after trend ends' metrics require pattern recognition logic beyond standard technical indicators. Translated using price breakout and return-based approximations, but pattern formation identification itself cannot be expressed.
translation_notes: Approximated upward breakout entry with close > pivot and 45% return threshold. Approximated downward breakout entry with close < pivot. Exit conditions use returns-based decline (30%) and rebound (59%) thresholds. True diamond pattern detection would require candlestick pattern recognition or custom shape-detection logic not available in this indicator library. Bear market success rate of 69% is noted but cannot be directly encoded in rule conditions.
